query: Check this repo's explicit commit rules and draft a matching commit message for the staged files.
I only want a commit suggestion that follows this repository's style family, with a safe fallback if the history is mixed.
If the repo is emoji-based, keep to the local allowlist. If not, don't force gitmoji.
The staged change is mostly layout cleanup. Draft a commit message without overclassifying it as a bug fix.
This repo usually writes short Korean commit titles. Polish my summary so it sounds natural for the repo before committing.
Follow the repo's commit format, but also match the recent wording style and language in the final title.
Generate release notes from the last ten commits.
